education.degree: Bachelor of Arts in Theatre Arts

experience.title: Stage Manager
responsibilities: Coordinated all aspects of production including scheduling, budgeting, and materials procurement.
Managed a team of technicians and performers to ensure smooth performances.
Communicated effectively with directors and actors to maintain artistic vision.

experience.title: Drama Instructor
responsibilities: Led workshops in acting techniques and performance for students aged 10-18.
Developed lesson plans that fostered creativity and self-expression.
Organized student performances and provided constructive feedback.

response.summary: Dynamic and creative Stage Manager with extensive experience in coordinating theatrical productions and teaching drama. Passionate about fostering artistic expression and building strong team dynamics. Seeking to leverage my leadership and communication skills in a new and challenging environment.
